scripts.clean: powershell -Command "$ports = 8000,8002,5173; foreach ($port in $ports) { $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($connections) { $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }"
